steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content: From the graph, the boundary line has slope $3$ and y-intercept $7$, giving $y = 3x + 7$. Eliminate B and D, which have intercept $-7$.

steps.title: Determine the inequality direction
steps.content:
The shaded region is above the line, so $y \gt 3x + 7$.

That confirms A is correct.
